_note: Curated text->3D prompts for the GAME-ONLY fighters the agents are cleared to generate (see CLAUDE.md MODEL OWNERSHIP DIRECTIVE). Do NOT add book/canon characters or Onyx's stable here — those are the owner's. Style suffix keeps them a consistent roster.
_style: full-body pro wrestler, T-pose, game-ready, clean single mesh, PBR textured, neutral background, symmetrical, muscular athletic build, no props

VIPER.prompt: a lean southpaw counter-puncher wrestler, icy pale-blue and silver ring gear, cold calculating look, snake-scale trim, short slick hair

KAGE.prompt: a karate-style wrestler in a black shadow gi vest with torn sleeves, dark hood down, mysterious ninja-adjacent, matte black and charcoal

BRUTUS.prompt: a massive iron brawler wrestler, heavy muscle, rust-red and gunmetal armored trunks, wrist chains, shaved head, scarred

ZEPHYR.prompt: an agile capoeira wrestler, lean and fast, teal and white flowing wind-motif gear, loose baggy pants, athletic barefoot-look boots

MORTUS.prompt: a grim grappler death-archetype wrestler, bone-white body paint over black, skeletal rib motif, tattered black shroud shorts, gaunt intimidating

RONIN.prompt: a masterless-samurai wrestler, deep crimson and black lacquer-armor trunks, topknot, single shoulder guard, disciplined

TITAN.prompt: a colossal powerhouse wrestler, enormous frame, bronze and navy singlet straps, granite-jaw, championship-giant presence

GOLEM.prompt: a heavy stone-golem-themed wrestler, cracked rocky grey skin texture, earthen brown trunks, immovable mass, glowing seam accents

env_ring: professional wrestling ring, elevated wooden deck platform, dark canvas mat with subtle center logo, black skirted fabric apron with pleats, four steel corner posts with ball tops, padded turnbuckles, NO ropes, realistic PBR materials, game-ready prop
env_arena_bowl: indoor wrestling arena bowl, raked stadium seating sections rising on all four sides, dark industrial ceiling with truss-mounted stage lights, center floor open for a ring, entrance stage with LED screen and ramp, realistic PBR, game-ready environment
env_barricade: wrestling ringside barricade section, black padded guardrail with fan-facing banner skirt, steel frame, modular straight segment, game-ready prop
env_steel_steps: wrestling ring steel entry steps, two-tier brushed steel staircase, worn metal, game-ready prop
